channel.title: Web-Security on z-r0crypt
channel.description: Recent content in Web-Security on z-r0crypt

item.title: Dangerous PHP Functions: Code Execution and Exploitation Reference
item.description: Comprehensive catalog of PHP functions exploitable for RCE, file manipulation, and information disclosure in OSWE/AWAE assessments.

item.title: OSWE/AWAE Preparation
item.description: This post contains all trainings and tutorials that could be useful for offensive security's OSWE certification.
